title: If/Else Condition
description: Write a conditional block that prints a message based on a score value.
problemStatement:
Teach your code to choose! Given `let score = 45`. If it's `>= 50`, print `"Excellent"`. Otherwise, print `"Nice Try"`.

**Requirement:** Use a standard `if/else` block.
hints: Include the `else` keyword for the fallback condition.
